plugins.name: bytheslice
plugins.description: ByTheSlice is a Claude Code plugin that takes a project from a free-form brief to a shipping production web app through a phased, subagent-driven workflow. v3 collapses ship-feature + ship-frontend into /bytheslice:deliver-stage (routes by stage type, gates on lint/type/build + type-aware aggregating test review, runs a non-skippable Library Preview Gate for every new component and every consumer-side user-visible edit) and adds /bytheslice:ship-pr as the universal closeout — push, PR, CI watch with auto-fix loop on red, user-authorized merge, main sync, branch + worktree cleanup.
